leadText: The Tri-Pass (Japanese: トライパス Tri-Pass) is a Key Item introduced in Generation III. It is one of the Sevii Island passes.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Tri-Pass allows the player to travel via the Seagallop ferries between the first three islands in the Sevii Islands : One Island , Two Island , and Three Island . During the first visit, the player can only travel between these three islands. After completing the story, the player can travel to any one of the three from Vermilion City 's port, and back again. Once the player has delivered the Ruby to Celio , he will take the player's Tri-Pass and exchange it for a Rainbow Pass .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description FR LG A pass for ferries between One , Two , and Three Island . It has a drawing of three islands. E A pass for ferries between One , Two , and Three Island .

Once the player has delivered the Ruby to Celio , he will take the player's Tri-Pass and exchange it for a Rainbow Pass .
